title: 2025年度 第2回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Which university did you go to?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Linwood.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you have a good experience there?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「良い経験だった？」に対して3の「とても楽しんだ」が適切。
highlights: Did you have a good experience there
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「橋の隣」→場所の話で無関係。2「明日行く」→過去の経験を聞かれている。3「とても楽しんだ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What are you doing, Julie?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm cleaning my room.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you need anything?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何か必要？」に3の「ゴミ袋」が具体的で適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「家の近く」→無関係。2「1時間かかる」→無関係。3「ゴミ袋」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That was a fantastic concert.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. I love that band.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Look! They're selling posters over there.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: I left it in a locker.
questions.explanation: 「ポスター売ってるよ」に1の「1枚買おう」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1枚買おう」→正解。2「今夜練習する」→ポスターと無関係。3「ロッカーに置いた」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How long is your history report?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Five pages.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why did you write so much?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「なぜそんなに書いたの？」に1の「トピックが面白かった」が理由として適切。
highlights: Why did you write so much
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「トピックが面白かった」→正解。2「家に忘れた」→理由になっていない。3「理科の方が好き」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Billy!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You have a phone call. It's Bob from the soccer team.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「電話だよ」に1の「OK、今行く」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「OK、今行く」→正解。2「話すのが好き」→不自然。3「彼は友達だ」→応答になっていない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You look very hot!

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I just played soccer outside.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You should drink something.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何か飲んだ方がいい」に2の「水を飲んだ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「公園でやった」→飲み物の提案への応答ではない。2「水を飲んだ」→正解。3「メガネを見つけた」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How was your Friday night with Andy?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: First, he took me to a nice restaurant.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What happened after that?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「その後どうなった？」に1の「指輪をくれた」が出来事の続きとして自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「指輪をくれた」→正解。2「彼がそうしたといいな」→不自然。3「別の人だった」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can we take the bus from here to the park?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, it takes ten minutes.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where do we get off?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どこで降りる？」に3の「2番目のバス停で」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「7ドル」→料金の話。2「あの通りに住んでる」→降りる場所の答えではない。3「2番目のバス停で」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where are the kids?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: In their rooms.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What are they doing? I have something to show them.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何してる？」に2の「寝てるよ」が適切な答え。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「気に入ってくれて嬉しい」→まだ見せていない。2「寝てるよ」→正解。3「10時頃」→時間の質問ではない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I can't wait to read this book.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you buy it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No. Rachel gave it to me.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「レイチェルがくれた」に1の「彼女は本をたくさん持ってる」が自然な応答。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「彼女は本をたくさん持ってる」→正解。2「新しい書店だ」→無関係。3「10時から」→無関係。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Fred, let's go shopping this afternoon.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. What do you want to get?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: A tennis racket. I'm starting lessons next month.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great.

questions.question: What does the girl want to do this afternoon?
questions.explanation: 女の子は「テニスラケットを買いたい」＝買い物に行きたい。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「コーチと話す」→言及なし。2「テニスをする」→レッスンは来月から。3「フレッドと勉強」→言及なし。4「ラケットを買う」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Ken, can you go to the store for me? I need some carrots.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure, Mom. What are you making for dinner?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Beef and vegetable stew.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sounds good.

questions.question: What does Ken's mother ask him to do?
questions.explanation: 母はケンに「にんじんを買ってきて」と頼んでいる。
highlights: can you go to the store
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「夕食を作る」→母が作る。2「肉を買う」→にんじん。3「にんじんを買う」→正解。4「野菜を洗う」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We have a math test tomorrow, right?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. And we need to finish our science reports by Friday.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll start writing mine today.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good idea.

questions.question: When will the boy start writing his science report?
questions.explanation: 男の子は「今日から書き始める」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日」→正解。2「明日」→数学のテスト。3「木曜」→言及なし。4「金曜」→締切日。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I like this video game, Edward. It's exciting.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks, Lucy. It's my friend's. I'm borrowing it for a week.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is it new?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, he got it last month.

questions.question: How long is Edward borrowing the game?
questions.explanation: エドワードは「1週間借りている」と言っている。
highlights: I'm borrowing it for a week
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1週間」→正解。2「2週間」→言及なし。3「1ヶ月」→友達が買った時期。4「2ヶ月」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. I bought this TV last week, but it doesn't work.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you please give me my money back?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll ask my manager.

questions.question: What is the woman's problem?
questions.explanation: 先週買ったテレビが動かない。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日仕事がある」→言及なし。2「お金が見つからない」→返金を求めている。3「テレビが壊れている」→正解。4「テレビがうるさい」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Emma. Are you going to the concert on Friday?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I want to, but I don't have a ticket.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My friend can't go. Do you want his ticket?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, please. I'll call you tonight.

questions.question: What will Emma do tonight?
questions.explanation: エマは「今夜電話する」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「チケットを買う」→もらう。2「コンサートに行く」→金曜日。3「男の子に会う」→電話。4「男の子に電話する」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are you going to the art club meeting, Jenny?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. It's in Mr. Smith's classroom, right?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. It's in the library today.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh. Thanks for telling me.

questions.question: Where will the art club meeting be today?
questions.explanation: 今日は図書館で行われる。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「体育館」→言及なし。2「スミス先生の教室」→否定された。3「音楽室」→言及なし。4「図書館」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you play any sports, Emma?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, I swim and play basketball.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When do you swim?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: On Fridays. I go to the pool after school.

questions.question: What does Emma do on Fridays?
choices: She works at a sports store.
questions.explanation: 金曜日は放課後プールに行く。
highlights: I go to the pool after school
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スポーツ店で働く」→言及なし。2「ビデオゲームをする」→言及なし。3「バスケを見る」→プレーする。4「プールに行く」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you ready for the soccer game on Saturday?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. We practiced on Monday, and we have practice again tomorrow evening.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Right. See you then.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Bye.

questions.question: When will they practice next?
questions.explanation: 「明日の夕方にまた練習がある」と言っている。
highlights: we have practice again tomorrow evening
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今晩」→明日。2「明日の夕方」→正解。3「土曜の朝」→試合の日。4「月曜の午後」→前回の練習日。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are you going to the park again, Emily?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, but I have to go home first.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I left my water bottle there.

questions.question: What will Emily do first?
questions.explanation: 「まず家に帰らないと」と言っている。
highlights: I have to go home first
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昼食を取る」→言及なし。2「友達に会う」→言及なし。3「公園に行く」→最初ではない。4「家に帰る」→正解。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I had a busy day today. I went to the sports club from ten to noon, and I worked at the supermarket in the afternoon. In the evening, I went to a musical with my friend.

questions.question: What did the woman do in the morning?
choices: She went to the sports club.
questions.explanation: 午前中（10時から正午）はスポーツクラブに行った。
highlights: I went to the sports club from ten to noon
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「友達に会った」→夕方。2「スポーツクラブに行った」→正解。3「ミュージカルを見た」→夕方。4「スーパーで働いた」→午後。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I have to write a report for history class. I don't have any good books at home, so I went to the library after school today. When I got there, it was closed. I'll go again on the weekend.

questions.question: What was the boy's problem?
choices: He forgot to do his homework.
He left his book at school.
questions.explanation: 図書館に行ったら閉まっていた。
highlights: When I got there, it was closed
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「宿題を忘れた」→レポートを書く必要がある。2「本を学校に忘れた」→家に良い本がない。3「図書館が開いてなかった」→正解。4「先生が不在」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When I was young, my favorite baseball player was Sam Wilder. My friends at school liked him, too. Now, he is the coach of a baseball team in Japan.

questions.question: What does Sam Wilder do now?
questions.explanation: 現在は日本の野球チームのコーチ。
highlights: he is the coach of a baseball team in Japan
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「選手」→昔。2「コーチ」→正解。3「日本語の先生」→Japanの混同。4「体育教師」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I have three sisters. They are 13, 9, and 5 years old. My youngest sister's birthday is next month.

questions.question: How old is the boy's youngest sister now?
questions.explanation: 一番下の妹は5歳。来月誕生日だがまだ5歳。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「3歳」→姉妹の人数と混同。2「5歳」→正解。3「9歳」→真ん中。4「13歳」→一番上。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Mr. Kato studies English three times a week. Next month, he's moving to London. He's going to work there for a year. He is excited about living in London.

questions.question: How long will Mr. Kato be in London?
questions.explanation: 「1年間そこで働く」と言っている。
highlights: He's going to work there for a year
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1週間」→英語の勉強回数と混同。2「3週間」→言及なし。3「1年」→正解。4「3年」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went to the supermarket on my way home from work. I bought apples, eggs, and bread, but I forgot to buy milk. I had to go again the next day.

questions.question: What did the man forget to buy?
questions.explanation: 「牛乳を買い忘れた」と明言。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「卵」→買った。2「パン」→買った。3「牛乳」→正解。4「りんご」→買った。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I went fishing with my family on Saturday. We enjoyed fishing at the lake for three hours. My dad caught two fish, my uncle caught four fish, and I caught five fish. My dad and uncle were so surprised.

questions.question: Who caught four fish?
questions.explanation: 「おじが4匹釣った」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「少年」→5匹。2「兄弟」→言及なし。3「父」→2匹。4「おじ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I was hungry after work today, but I didn't feel like cooking. So, I called my friend and asked him to go to a restaurant with me. We had a great time.

questions.question: Where did the man go after work?
questions.explanation: 友達と一緒にレストランに行った。
highlights: go to a restaurant with me
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「スーパー」→言及なし。2「図書館」→言及なし。3「レストラン」→正解。4「友達の家」→レストラン。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good morning. This is the Sunday morning news. The weather will be cloudy all week. It will start raining on Wednesday night and stop on Thursday night. The weather will get better next week.

questions.question: When will it begin to rain?
questions.explanation: 「水曜日の夜に雨が降り始める」と言っている。
highlights: It will start raining on Wednesday night
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「土曜の朝」→放送日。2「月曜の朝」→言及なし。3「水曜の夜」→正解。4「木曜の夜」→雨が止む日。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Kevin likes to read books. Last week, Kevin read a science fiction book about space. Kevin thought the book was very interesting. He wants to read a book about history next.

questions.question: What did Kevin do last week?
choices: He read a science fiction book.
questions.explanation: 先週SFの本を読んだ。
highlights: Kevin read a science fiction book about space
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「歴史本を売った」→次に読みたい本。2「SF本を読んだ」→正解。3「映画を見た」→本を読んだ。4「教科書を買った」→言及なし。
